title: From Hackathon to Devconnect with Thiru | Metis | Devconnect Special Podcast | ECH Institute
description:
In this engaging conversation, Thiru from Project Metis shares insights on his journey through hackathons, the significance of the Ethereum community, and the innovative solutions being developed to address data attribution issues in AI applications. He discusses the evolution of Metis beyond a layer 2 solution and highlights the opportunities available for developers within the ecosystem. Thiru also offers valuable advice for newcomers in the blockchain space, emphasizing the importance of building a strong profile and networking.
